title: Hushkey
description: The go-to platform for foreigners moving to Japan — cutting through opaque local markets for housing and work, with native Japanese ↔ English translation, operator-managed listings, and a subscription model.

title: Howl
description: Production-grade Deno framework powering Hushkey — file-system routing, typed islands, and single-pass SSR.

title: Hound
description: Multi-backend job queue for Deno — Redis, Deno KV, or in-memory. Sorted-set delivery, crash recovery, cron, type-safe emit, and an HTTP gateway.
